history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The cell immediately in front of me at row 02 column C is lava (`L`), so moving forward would be fatal. I need to avoid the lava and find a safe path, so I will turn clockwise to face down first.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The cell in front at row 03 column B is safe (`.`), so the best next step is to move forward into that cell.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 04 column B is safe, so I should continue forward toward the open lower corridor.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 05 column B is safe, so I should keep moving forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 06 column B is safe and leads into the open area below, so I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 07 column B is lava, so I must avoid going forward. The safe way toward the goal in the lower-right area is to turn right to face the open corridor on row 06.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing left. The cell ahead at row 06 column A is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To head toward the open path and eventually the goal, I should rotate clockwise to face down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 05 column B is safe, so moving forward is valid and brings me closer to the open area above.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B facing up, and the cell ahead at row 04 column B is safe. Continuing forward will keep me on the safe path toward the upper corridor that can lead around the lava barrier.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 03 column B is safe, so I should move forward to keep advancing through the left side corridor.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 02 column B is safe, so moving forward is the best next step to continue upward toward the open route.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing up. The cell ahead is a wall, so I cannot continue forward. To progress toward the goal at row 08 column H, I need to turn right and look for the safe corridor to the east.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. I need to avoid it by turning counter-clockwise to face up, but that is also blocked by a wall; the safer route is to turn clockwise to face down and move along the open path below.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 03 column B is safe, so I should move forward to continue down the left corridor toward the lower open area.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 04 column B is safe, so I should keep moving forward down the left side.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 05 column B is safe, so I should move forward again to reach the open area below.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 06 column B is safe, and continuing downward keeps me on the open path toward the goal area.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 07 column B is lava, so I must not move forward. The safe way to continue toward the open area and the goal is to turn right and head east.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing left. The cell ahead on the left is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To get to the open cells to the right, I should rotate clockwise to face up or down? From left, turning clockwise points up, which would not help. Turning counter-clockwise from left points down into lava. So the safe progression toward the corridor is to turn clockwise twice later, but for this immediate step I should turn clockwise to reorient toward the top route.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 05 column B is safe, so moving forward is the best next step to continue through the open passage.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B facing up. The cell ahead is row 04 column B, which is safe, so I should keep moving forward toward the upper part of the map.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE

<thought>

</thought>

<thought>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing up. The cell ahead is a wall at row 01 column B, so I cannot move forward. To continue toward the goal, I need to turn right so I can head east through the safe corridor.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The next cell row 02 column C is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. I should turn down to go around via the safe route below.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>
